title: clompanus armata
side_effects: Clompanus armata can have side effects if used improperly, such as seizures, convulsions, and respiratory failure in severe cases. Prolonged use can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Some individuals may experience skin irritation, including rashes and blisters, due to allergic reactions. In rare instances, excessive consumption of the plant's toxic compounds can cause permanent neurological damage.
